typeArgumentArityErrorSkipsTrivia.tlua(6,5): error TLUA2558: Expected 1 type arguments, but got 2.


==== typeArgumentArityErrorSkipsTrivia.tlua (2 errors) ====
    declare function f<T>(a: T): T;
    
    f<   string, number>("a");
         ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2558: Expected 1 type arguments, but got 2.

        string, number>("a");
